name: JANEL CORP
business: Janel Corporation is a holding company with three segments: Logistics (freight forwarding, customs brokerage, warehousing), Life Sciences (antibodies, research and diagnostic reagents, custom services), and Manufacturing (mixing equipment). It serves academic, non-profit, commercial, and industrial customers.
sellsTo: academic, non-profit and commercial customers (Life Sciences)
small- to mid-sized businesses and larger customers (Manufacturing)

exposures.sentence: The Logistics segment is a non-asset based, full-service provider of cargo transportation logistics management services, including freight forwarding via air, ocean and land-based carriers; customs brokerage services; warehousing and distribution services; trucking and other value-added logistics services.

The Company’s Life Sciences segment manufactures and distributes antibodies as well as research and diagnostic reagents for, and provides custom services to academic, non-profit and commercial customers.

The Company’s Manufacturing segment is comprised of Indco, Inc. (Indco). Indco is a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company that manufactures and distributes mixing equipment and apparatuses for specific applications within various industries.
